title: Surgeon Vacancy at Narayana Health - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Narayana Health - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Narayana Health has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Gurgaon office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Narayana Health:
Narayana Health is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Narayana Health!
